title: Adult human lung cell dissociation (on ice)
author: Andrew Potter

steps_raw.instruction: Transfer 13 mg tissue to petri dish on ice with 100 µL enzyme mix; using razor blade mince thoroughly for 2 min until large chunks are broken up finely. 00:02:00, mince on ice
Add 13 mg minced tissue to 900 µL enzyme mix (1 mL total) in 1.5 mL tube using cut p200 pipet to transfer. undetermined, minced human lung tissue
Incubate on ice. Triturate 10x using 1 mL pipet set to 700 µL every 3 min (w/tip cut). Shake 3-5X to re-suspend every 2 min. 00:03:00, triturate 10X 00:02:00, shake 3-5X
After 30 minutes of incubation let settle on ice 1 min. 00:30:00, incubate on ice 00:01:00, settle one min

Pipet and save 80% of the supernatant (consisting of released cells), leaving undigested tissue chunks on the bottom of the tube. Add released cells (supernatant) to sterile 30 µM filter on 15 mL conical. Rinse filter w/12 mL ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS. Tap filter to ensure passage of cells. 12 mL, ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS
Remove filter from 15 mL conical. Spin the 15 mL conical with released cells 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C. 00:05:00, spin at 300 g Undetermined

Remove supernatant for the 15 mL conical with pelleted supernatant. Re-suspend the pellet in 14 mL ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS and leave on ice while performing next steps. undetermined, ice-cold 10% FBS / PBS
Add additional 1 mL enzyme mix to residual tissue chunks from Layer 1. undetermined, enzyme mix

Continue incubating on ice for 40 additional minutes (1 hr. 10 min. total). Triturate 10x using 1 mL pipet set to 700 µL every 3 min (w/tip cut if necessary). Shake 3-5X to re-suspend every 2 min. 00:40:00, incubate on ice 00:03:00, triturate 10x 00:02:00, shake 3-5X
After 1 hr. 10 min total incubation time triturate digest mix 10X and add total digest mix (including any chunks) to a new sterile 30 µM filter on 15 mL conical.
Rinse filter w/12 mL ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS. undetermined, ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS
Remove supernatant for all tubes. Re-suspend combined volume in 5 mL RBC lysis buffer. Pipet 20x to mix. Incubate on ice 5 min. undetermined, RBC lysis buffer 00:05:00, incubate on ice
Add 9 mL ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS to 5 mL RBC lysis buffer. Triturate and apply to sterile 30 µM filter on 15 mL conical. undetermined, ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS
Separate flow-through to two 15 mL conicals. Bring volume for each to 14 mL with ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS. undetermined, 10% FBS/PBS
Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove supernatant. 00:05:00, spin 300 g 4 °C
Re-suspend cells in 100 µL ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS. Analyze viability and cell yield using a hemocytometer with trypan blue. undetermined, 10% FBS/PBS
Adjust cell concentration to 700-1200 cells / µL for 10x chromium.
Remove filter. Spin the 15 mL conicals from the first and second layer, 300 g for 5 min at 4 ºC. 00:05:00, spin 300 g 4 °C
